# nullcloud_vpc (Resource)

Manages a NullCloud VPC.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nullcloud_vpc" "example" {
  name = "my-vpc"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String)
